theme: exact multi-object references and correction chains

finding.rootCause: Former/latter and list-reorder prompts relied on model inference, allowing invented values and placeholder list labels; plural callbacks also depended on brittle exact-keyword relevance.
finding.correction: Bounded extractive tools now resolve explicit paired facts and real numbered-list operations, while plural and paired references retain only the active temporary topic.

nextCycle: Exercise causal references and correction conflicts that reverse or partially restore earlier values.
